faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Hollis typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, full exclusion work, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Hollis properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Hollis home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Hollis residents. The complete removal process typically takes 3-7 days, depending on how many squirrels are present. Our technicians will set humane traps, monitor daily, and seal all entry points once we confirm all squirrels have been removed from your attic or walls.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods safe for my family and pets in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-catch traps and pet-safe exclusion materials for all squirrel removal jobs in Hollis. Our methods comply with New York wildlife regulations and prioritize the safety of your family, pets, and the animals themselves. We never use poisons or harmful chemicals during the removal process.

faqs.question: Will squirrels return after removal in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive exclusion work prevents re-entry. We seal all potential entry points with heavy-duty materials like galvanized steel mesh and perform a thorough inspection of your roof, soffits, vents, and chimneys. All our squirrel removal services in Hollis come with a warranty to guarantee squirrels won't return to the treated areas.
